name: Pot Roast Caribe
recipeIngredient: 1 tbsp Each cocoa and chili powder
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown roast on all sides in hot oil in a large Dutch oven; remove roast, reserving drippings.
2. Saute garlic and chopped onion in pan drippings for 5 minutes, or until onion is tender.
3. Add salt, tomato sauce, and chopped green chiles, stirring well.
4. Combine sugar, flour, cocoa, chili powder, oregano, cumin, coriander, and cinnamon in a small bowl; stir well.
5. Add the sugar mixture, orange rind, and ground almonds to the tomato mixture in the Dutch oven; stir well.
6. Return roast to the Dutch oven; cover, reduce heat to low, and cook for 2 hours or until meat is tender.
7. Add boiling onions and squash to the Dutch oven; cook an additional 20 minutes or until vegetables are tender.
8. Remove roast to a serving platter; spoon sauce over roast. Arrange vegetables around roast and sprinkle with slivered almonds.
9. If desired, garnish with parsley sprigs and cherry tomatoes.
Yield: 6 to 8 servings.
